data.name: Trophies: A Corruption Tale
data.detailed_description:
CONTENT, MECHANICS AND DEVELOPMENT

This game focuses heavily on changing outfits and their erotic appeal.

The introductory stage is an introduction to the setting, story and some of the mechanics. There is little decision making involved.  So it is a linear progression.

After reaching the maximum level of corruption of each character, the idea is to open a huge range of unlockable scenes, events and other characters in a free-roaming navigation system.

The game has these systems partially working:

  • Statistics system

  • Outfits system

  • Time/day system

  • Free roam system

  • Animation speed control system

  • Messy makeup system

  • Global system of idle sprites with clothing changes

  • Itinerary system

  • Dynamic conversation system during scenes

  • Replay gallery

Existing content type:

  • Sex

  • Blowjobs

  • Handjobs

  • Footjobs

  • Titjobs

  • Thightjobs

  • Assjobs

  • Ahegao

  • Male domination

  • Milfs, a lot

  • Corruption

  • Cheating

Planned content type (soon):

  • Pregnancy

  • Piercings

  • Hairstyles

  • Unlockable outfits system

  • MFF

  • Anal

  • Unlockable scenes system

  • Harem

With the system we have, much of the content can be optional, such as pregnancy or piercings.

Deadlines:

The time between updates is usually between 30 and 60 days depending on the size of the update.

Next steps:

An English editor, and translations into several languages.


關於此遊戲

Embark on a story full of sex, entirely Hand-drawn digital artwork. Meet women as beautiful as they are crazy. Corrupt them little by little and show them a different world.

Transported to another world, you've heard it so many times before. Discover your power, uncover your destiny. Who are you? The answers will come to you as you enjoy your new life.
data.about_the_game:
Embark on a story full of sex, entirely Hand-drawn digital artwork. Meet women as beautiful as they are crazy. Corrupt them little by little and show them a different world.

Transported to another world, you've heard it so many times before. Discover your power, uncover your destiny. Who are you? The answers will come to you as you enjoy your new life.
data.short_description: Trophies is an adult visual novel where you take on the role of a man transported to another world. A world full of latent perversions, beautiful women, and sexy stories. Unlock women, free them from their false morals, dress them up, and enjoy.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 GHZ
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
